violations.text: -Milk was observed at 50 degrees Fahrenheit in cooler with ice. Milk was assessed and was buried with ice during time of inspection. -Milk and oatmilk were observed at 54 and 82 degrees Fahrenheit in carafes. Ice was added to carafes to chill milks. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025
